mappings.rationale: Directly covers philosophies of education, the learning process, teaching methods, and the organization of educational systems.
Directly covers higher education including colleges, universities, and professional schools (subsection C.1.c).
Directly covers processes of learning and thinking including experimental findings and theories (subsection B.1).
Covers cognitive development in children, relevant to learning processes and preschool education.
Covers the psychology of adolescent learners, relevant to secondary education (subsection C.1.b).
Covers psychological foundations of learning, cognition, and behaviour relevant to educational theory.
Covers cognitive processes of thinking and reasoning central to the learning process (subsection B.1).
Covers behavioural approaches to learning and modifying behaviour, relevant to pedagogy.
Covers creative thinking as an aspect of the learning process and educational development.
Covers theories of intelligence relevant to the learning process and special education.
Covers memory processes essential to learning and the retention of knowledge.
Covers autism as relevant to special education and the education of exceptional children (subsection C.1.d).
Covers dyslexia as relevant to special education and reading instruction (subsection C.1.d).
Covers computer-based instruction and AI applications in educational technology (subsection B.2.d).
Covers information systems relevant to instructional media and educational technology.
Covers the economics and sociology of education including institutional functions and social roles.
Covers leadership principles relevant to educational administration and the teaching profession.
Covers vocational training, apprenticeship, and employee training programs (subsection C.1.f).
Covers reading as a fundamental educational skill and its role in the learning process.
Covers the psychological aspects of language acquisition relevant to educational linguistics.
Covers the historical development of attitudes toward childhood education and child-rearing.
